title: Fresh Dense British Jersey Royal Potatoes Stir-fry
description: A one-pot dish featuring fresh and dense Jersey Royal potatoes, cooked in a tandoor-inspired method with minimal effort.
instructions: Slice the potatoes into thin rounds and place them in a baking dish.
Toss with olive oil, salt, pepper, and chopped garlic. Roast for about 15 minutes.
Drizzle more olive oil over the potatoes and return to oven until golden brown and crispy, about another 5-7 minutes.
While the potatoes are roasting, heat a non-stick skillet on medium-high heat.
Add chopped onion and cook until translucent and lightly caramelized.
Gently mix roasted potatoes with cooked onions. Add fresh herbs like parsley or chives for extra flavor if desired.
Serve hot as a side dish or main course.
